Bd3 f5 4. exf5 |eco=[[Chess/ECOB|B00]] |parent=[[Chess/King's Pawn Opening|King's Pawn Opening]] }} = Matovinsky Gambit Accepted = ===4. exf5 === Accepting the gambit by taking black's f-pawn. Black can now play: *4...Bxg2, capturing white's unprotected g-pawn, and threatening white's cornered rook ==Theory table== {{ChessTable}} '''1.e4 b6 2. d4 Bb7 3. Bd3 f5 4. exf5'''
4 5 6 7 8
...
[[/4...Bxg2|Bxg2]]		 Qh5+
g6		 fxg6
Nf6		 gxh7+
Nxh5		 Bg6#
